title: PMShaders
description: PMShaders give shader support to ProtoManly's weather mod.
body:
# Protomanly Shaders

This mod adds Iris compatibility to Protomanly's Weather mod. It is only required on the client side (and nothing will happpen if you add it server side) because all it does is allow Iris to work properly with PMWeather.

This mod is not endorsed by PMWeather. 

Do not distribute modified versions of this jar without the express permission of the creator of this mod. You may contact him on discord: ```__ali_king_```.
To make a bug report contact me via discord.
**You may add this to modpacks if you like.**

Feel free to try it out on a public smp: [https://modrinth.com/server/pmplay](https://modrinth.com/server/pmplay)

![Example of shaders with PMWeather.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/P8ibnjWb/images/20ce06aa4be1c25d6e20d3baf631d154a774def2.png)
